Founded with ideology: 賢者3:  Exploration**

This dichotomy pits the desire for stability and balance (賢者1) against the drive to explore and discover new things (賢者3). The wise words of 賢者2, emphasizing unity in diversity, provide a middle ground that acknowledges both perspectives.
